description_long: This is a dark brown, glass bottle with a rounded, cylindrical body that tapers smoothly into a short neck, topped with a light-colored cork stopper. The front of the bottle features a large, ornate label with a pirate ship illustration, decorative scrollwork, and the word 'RUM' prominently displayed, suggesting it is a liquor bottle. The glass surface is glossy and slightly mottled, giving it an aged or vintage appearance. The bottle is opaque, preventing visibility of its contents, and the cork appears tightly fitted. There are no visible handles or additional features aside from the label and cork. The overall design is reminiscent of classic rum bottles often found in bars or urban settings.
description: A dark brown, vintage-style glass bottle with a cork stopper and a decorative 'RUM' label on the front. The bottle has a glossy, mottled finish and an opaque body.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen at an angle, showing its rounded body, glossy dark surface, and the cork stopper, with only a hint of the label visible on the side.
description_view_1: The front view displays the ornate 'RUM' label with a pirate ship illustration, decorative elements, and the cork stopper clearly visible.
description_view_2: This side view highlights the bottle's smooth, curved profile and the edge of the label, with the cork stopper on top.
description_view_3: The back view shows the plain, glossy dark surface of the bottle with no label or markings, and the cork stopper on top.
attribute_label_or_branding: A large, ornate label on the front with a pirate ship illustration, decorative scrollwork, and the word 'RUM' in bold letters. The label is light blue with black and white details.
